name: Adapt New Strategies
text: Own 2 faction technologies and control 2 planets, each with a technology specialty matching the prerequisite color of any of those technologies. A "Valefar Assimilator" technology counts only if it is currently copying another faction's technology.

name: Become the Gatekeeper
text: Have 1 or more ships in a system that contains an alpha wormhole and 1 or more ships in a different system that contains a beta wormhole.

name: Establish Hegemony
text: Control planets outside of your home system that have a combined influence value of at least 12.

name: Foster Cohesion
text: Be neighbors with all other players and have at least 2 neighbors that are not neighbors with each other.

name: Fuel the War Machine
text: Have 3 space docks in systems not adjacent to each other.

name: Gather a Mighty Fleet
text: Have dreadnoughts in 5 systems other than your home system.

name: Hoard Raw Materials
text: Control planets outside of your home system that have a combined resource value of at least 12.

name: Learn the Secrets of the Cosmos
text: Have 1 or more ships in 3 systems that are each adjacent to a different anomaly.

name: Master the Laws of Physics
text: Own 4 technologies of the same color and control a planet that has a technology specialty of that color.

name: Mechanize The Military
text: Have mechs on planets in 4 systems other than your home system.

name: Seize an Icon
text: Control 2 legendary planets outside of your home system.

name: Strengthen Bonds
text: Have promissory notes in your play area from at least 2 different players.

name: Threaten Enemies
text: Have 3 or more non-fighter ships in a system that is adjacent to another player's home system.

name: Dictate Policy
text: A "For" outcome of a law is resolved and it is the third or later law in play.

name: Brave the Void
text: Win a space combat in an anomaly against a player and have 3 or more ground forces in the space area of the active system.

name: Demonstrate Your Power
text: Win a space combat against a player and have 5 or more non-fighter ships in the active system.

name: Spark a Rebellion
text: Win a combat against a player who has the most victory points and more than you.

name: Unveil Flagship
text: Win a space combat against a player and have your flagship and 3 or more fighters in the active system.
